n: Zidir-nesad: The Jewel of Masal Recovered

steps.t: The first location can be found in the Pit of Stonejaws. You should stand at the first location. 'As you were walking, you got to where you needed to …
The second location can be found in the Pit of Stonejaws. You should stand at the second location. 'I bear the symbol of your line and kept you safe d…

The fourth location can be found in the Pit of Stonejaws. You should stand at the fourth location. 'As chance would have it, I have both pierced the s…
The fifth location can be found in the Pit of Stonejaws. You should stand at the fifth location. 'I was there when the first tree fell to build your h…
The sixth location can be found in the Pit of Stonejaws. You should stand at the sixth location. 'I was there when you struck the nails that would hol…
The seventh location can be found in the Pit of Stonejaws. You should stand at the seventh location. 'I have found all that remains just out of your g…
The Jewel of Masal can be found in the Pit of Stonejaws. You should collect the Jewel of Masal.
The Throne of Zidir-nesad can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should add the Jewel of Masal to the Throne of Zidir-nesad under Rísti Graver…
Rísti Graver can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
